creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/?all=1&type=package doesn't list 114amd64 yet. Intermittent build failures due to SIGSEGV (e.g., hardware error, -CURRENT kernel regression) or SIGKILL (e.g., out-of-memory) are non-trivial to reproduce and often can't be fixed (not worked around) on gecko@ side.

Off to portmgr@ to investigate.
